title: eurya candicans
intro: Eurya candicans, also known as the "Wax Apple Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphyllaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Eurya candicans include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential to support the immune system and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Eurya candicans is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be taken internally or applied topically to various health conditions.
